violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Prep counter with chili microwave interior and the kitchen prep table by the ketchup dispenser noted not properly maintained.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in the ware-washing area behind the 3-comp sink wall by the slush machine floors in the walk-in cooler around the shelving legs floors in the walk-in freezer under the shelving and floors in the men's restroom under and around toilet; noted in need of cleaning.

REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid (lid open). Also the dumpster containment area gates were noted open. These are to be shut when not be being utilized.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Top of the white reach-in freezer (sliding glass door) side of the cooler in blizzard area slush machine shelf reach-in freezer interior containing fries small shelf over cooler drawers (under microwave) and the microwave exterior including the handle; noted not clean.

REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. Also the cement under the dumpster noted with litter food and dried liquid garbage; noted in need of cleaning.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops noted not hung.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in the kitchen over toping cooler (also glass) behind chili and cheese crocks near prep sink and under blizzard blender counter noted in need of cleaning. Floors under equipment in kitchen in the walk-in freezer and under blizzard blender counter in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning. Ceiling over blizzard blenders noted in need of cleaning.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Outside of garbage can under blizzard blenders reach-in freezer interiors interior of ice cream mix reach-in coolers under ice cream machine top and front of slush machine side of front of ice cream cake reach-in freezer in kitchen stainless steal shelving under food service station near dining room registers and fronts of cabinets under dining room drink station noted not clean.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Hand sink in men's room noted with beverage can and face mask on the hand sink noted in need of cleaning.
